zh.lifeSummary: Maude Bosville是Unknown Bosvile和Alicia Gunthwaite的女兒，於1368年出生在英國越可爾設維特。她於大約1411年與Thomas Reresby II結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和6個女兒的父母。她去世於1430年6月7日在英國享年62歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Maude Bosville是Unknown Bosvile和Alicia Gunthwaite的女儿，于1368年出生在英国越可爾設維特。她于大约1411年与Thomas Reresby II结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和6个女儿的父母。她去世于1430年6月7日在英国享年62岁。

nameMeanings.name: Bosville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French: variant of   Bonneville   and, in North America, (also) an altered form of this.

variants.name: Bonneville
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Francois, Liette, Normand, Pierre.
French: habitational name from any of numerous places called Bonneville, from Old French bonne ‘good’ + ville ‘settlement’. Compare Bonville .
Altered form of French Bonnevialle: habitational name from Bonnevialle in the central part of France.

nameMeanings.name: Maude
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant of   Maud  , the usual spelling of the name in North America.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: Maude Bosville was born in 1368, in Chevet, Yorkshire, England as the daughter of Unknown Bosvile and Alicia Gunthwaite. She married Thomas Reresby II about 1411. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 6 daughters. She died on 7 June 1430, in England, at the age of 62.

fr.lifeSummary: Maude Bosville est née en 1368, à Chevet, Everwyck, Angleterre, fille de Unknown Bosvile et Alicia Gunthwaite. Elle a épousé Thomas Reresby II environ 1411. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 6 filles. Elle est décédée le 7 juin 1430, à Angleterre, à l’âge de 62 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Maude Bosville wurde 1368 in Chevet, Yorkshire, England, als Tochter von Unknown Bosvile und Alicia Gunthwaite geboren. Sie hat um 1411 Thomas Reresby II geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Sie starb am 7. Juni 1430 im Alter von 62 Jahren in England.

it.lifeSummary: Maude Bosville è nata il nel 1368 nel Chevet, Yorkshire, England come figlia di Unknown Bosvile e Alicia Gunthwaite. Lei sposato Thomas Reresby II circa 1411. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 6 figlie. Morì il 7 giugno 1430, nel England, all'età di 62 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Maude Bosvilleは1368年にイギリスヨークシュアイアチェベトでUnknown BosvileとAlicia Gunthwaiteの娘として生まれた。約1411年にThomas Reresby IIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼女は1430年6月7日にイギリスで62歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Maude Bosville(은)는 1368년 영국 요르크실르 처베트에서 Unknown Bosvile(와)과 Alicia Gunthwaite의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1411년 Thomas Reresby II(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1430년 6월 7일 영국에서 62세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Maude Bosville nasceu em 1368, em Chevet, Yorkshire, Inglaterra filha de Unknown Bosvile e Alicia Gunthwaite. Ela casou-se com Thomas Reresby II aproximadamente 1411. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 6 filhas. Ela faleceu em 7 de junho de 1430, em Inglaterra, com 62 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Maude Bosville родилась в 1368 г. в местности чевет, еркшир, Англия. Её родителей звали Unknown Bosvile и Alicia Gunthwaite. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Reresby II около 1411 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 6 дочерей. Она умерла 7 июня 1430 г. в местности Англия в возрасте 62 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Maude Bosville nació en 1368, en Chevet, Yorkshire, Inglaterra como hija de Unknown Bosvile y Alicia Gunthwaite. Se casó con Thomas Reresby II aproximadamente 1411. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió el 7 de junio de 1430, en Inglaterra, a la edad de 62 años.
